title: selaginella paxii
intro: Selaginella paxii, also known as the resurrection fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Selaginella paxii plant are typically dried and used as a tea or added to herbal supplements.
